arts.ttl: Real Madrid stars show their support to Dani Carvajal following horror injury
arts.sum: Real Madrid managed to get a 2-0 win over the line against Villarreal on Saturday evening. One of the biggest talking points of the night was the horror injury which…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid beats Villarreal 2-0 in La Liga but loses Carvajal to leg injury
arts.sum: Celta Vigo striker Iago Aspas was sent off in a 1-0 win at last-placed Las Palmas after being issued consecutive yellow cards for protesting. Federico Valverde and Vinícius Júnior scored for the defending champions four days after they lost at Lille 1-0 in the Champions League to halt a 36-game unbeaten streak in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 2-0 Villarreal: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Los Blancos return to winning ways
arts.sum: Real Madrid respond to their Champions League setback last week by recording a 2-0 victory over Villarreal in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Worrying scenes for Real Madrid as Vinicius Jr. and Dani Carvajal both come off against Villarreal with injuries
arts.sum: Real Madrid secured a confident yet straightforward 2-0 win against Villarreal on Saturday evening, with Federico Valverde and Vinicius Jr. getting the goals. There were worrying scenes for Carlo Ancelotti’s…

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Real Madrid 2 - 0 Villarreal, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: In a hard-fought game at the Santiago Bernabeu, Real Madrid secured a 2-0 victory over Villarreal thanks to long-range goals from Fede Valverde and Vinicius Jr. While the match itself lacked the usual flair and dynamism that fans might have hoped for, Los Blancos did enough to get the job done, ensuring all three points stayed in the capital. It was a much-needed breakthrough for Madrid, who had otherwise struggled to break down Villarreal’s defense apart from one big chance for Mbappe, and some great dribbling sequences from Vinicius Jr on the left.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid bounce back from Champions League defeat and sink Villarreal
arts.sum: Real Madrid moved level with rivals Barcelona, ahead of the Blaugrana's match on Sunday, by defeating Villarreal 2-0 on Saturday night. Jude Bellingham tried his luck with a shot that went wide of the goal later in the half, while Kylian Mbappe couldn't get a shot off after seemingly being played in behind the Villarreal defence.

arts.ttl: Patrice Evra: France don’t want to risk Real Madrid issue over Kylian Mbappe
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and France star Patrice Evra believes Les Bleus are playing politics over their decision not to call up Kylian Mbappe . Didier Deschamps confirmed his squad in midweek ahead of two incoming UEFA Nations League games against Israel and Belgium. He opted against calling up his captain, after a conversation with Mbappe […] The post Patrice Evra: France don’t want to risk Real Madrid issue over Kylian Mbappe appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye bid for Wharton; Real Madrid's plan to sign Alexander-Arnold revealed
arts.sum: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid are interested in signing Thomas Partey once his contract expires in summer 2025. Arsenal are plotting a move for 18-year-old Barcelona starlet Arnau Pradas .

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Villarreal, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Villarreal in La Liga. Real Madrid starting XI: Lunin, Carvajal, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Mendy, Camavinga, Valverde, Bellingham, Modric, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: France ‘intrigued’ by Kylian Mbappé’s inclusion in Real Madrid squad after Les Bleus omission
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, the coaching staff of the France national team are ‘intrigued’ by the decision of Carlo Ancelotti to include Kylian Mbappé (25) in his Real Madrid squad on Saturday…
